scope: Bounded legacy scanner implementation slice; not a complete legacy application or complete primary source set.

files.notes: Exact historical scanner component for a bounded /app/legacy/scanner reconstruction slice. Stage in the isolated historical subtree; adapt before activation.
Exact historical stylesheet containing scanner-specific html5-qrcode rules and historical theme context. Stage only; do not import globally without review.
Historical dependency context only. Do not replace scan3/package.json; dependency changes require explicit implementation review.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in the packet-creation container; AI Studio must run scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet covers only the historical scanner slice.
The exact historical scanner depends on html5-qrcode and lucide-react; package.json is reference-only and must not replace scan3/package.json.
The historical stylesheet is staged, not authorized for global import.
No Firebase connectivity or production data operation is included or authorized.
The primary candidate commit is not asserted to contain every pre-redesign fix.
